title: IIT Hyderabad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad)
short_info: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on 14 May 2026 on the official website iith.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Hyderabad Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech / B.E. in Electrical Engineering / Electrical & Electronics Engineering / Power Systems, Minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA in UG and PG degrees
qualification.details: B.Tech / B.E. in Electrical Engineering / Electrical & Electronics Engineering / Power Systems with minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA in UG and PG degrees.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- + HRA @ 30% (as per Institute norms) Per Month

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and alignment with project requirements Online/In-person Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Hyderabad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Hyderabad JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Hyderabad is June 4, 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Tech / B.E. degree in Electrical Engineering, Electrical & Electronics Engineering, or Power Systems, with a minimum of 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA in both undergraduate and postgraduate degrees.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 30 years. Age relaxation details, if any, are usually specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000/- per month, along with HRA at 30% as per Institute norms.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on merit and project requirements, followed by an online or in-person interview, and document verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Hyderabad must be submitted online through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position announced under this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Hyderabad is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q10. Where is IIT Hyderabad located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad is located in Sangareddy, Telangana, with the pincode 502284.
